---
name: Design Critique
about: Challenge an assumption, mechanism, clause, or public claim
title: '[CRITIQUE] '
labels: critique, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## Critique type
<!-- Mechanism failure, incentive problem, contradiction, overclaim, ambiguity, implementation risk, accessibility problem, other -->

## Section being challenged
<!-- Specific document, article, annex, clause, claim-register row, roadmap phase, patch (P-XXX), or threat (T-XXX) -->

## The assumption or mechanism you are challenging
<!-- What does the current design assume? Why is that assumption wrong or incomplete? -->

## Failure mechanism
<!-- Step by step: how does the design fail, get gamed, exclude people, centralize power, or create a worse incentive? -->

## Who is harmed?
<!-- Ordinary users, vulnerable users, workers, small stewards, public operators, local communities, future generations, etc. -->

## Evidence or reasoning
<!-- What makes you think this fails? Real-world case, logical analysis, incentive argument? -->

## Proposed alternative
<!-- What would you do instead? Or what question would need to be answered first? -->

## Claim/readiness impact
<!-- Does this change a claim status in docs/Claims_Evidence_Register.md or a gate in docs/Pilot_Evidence_Roadmap.md? -->
